channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: CFTC faces a crowded debate over prediction markets as 1,500 comments test federal vs. state oversight. Is the rule a win for market clarity or a choke on growth? 💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/cftc-prediction-market-rule-comments #fintech #regulation #blockchain
item.description: CFTC faces a crowded debate over prediction markets as 1,500 comments test federal vs. state oversight. Is the rule a win for market clarity or a choke on growth? 💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/cftc-prediction-market-rule-comments #fintech #regulation #blockchain

item.title: Stablecoins aren’t just tokens—they’re core financial infrastructure, Hackett says. Grow beyond the label in a $321B market. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/stablecoin-term-outdated-a16z #crypto #fintech #stablecoin
item.description: Stablecoins aren’t just tokens—they’re core financial infrastructure, Hackett says. Grow beyond the label in a $321B market. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/stablecoin-term-outdated-a16z #crypto #fintech #stablecoin

item.title: Bitcoin buys pause as Q1 looming: Strategy, the top corporate holder, halts new purchases at ~$78.8k. Could earnings miss reset the tape? 🧨 https://Blockchain.News/news/strategy-pauses-bitcoin-buys-q1-earnings #Bitcoin #Strategy #MSTR
item.description: Bitcoin buys pause as Q1 looming: Strategy, the top corporate holder, halts new purchases at ~$78.8k. Could earnings miss reset the tape? 🧨 https://Blockchain.News/news/strategy-pauses-bitcoin-buys-q1-earnings #Bitcoin #Strategy #MSTR
